MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-18-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Resurgence Financial, LLC., no appearance by the Plaintiff.
Defendant: Cheuklun Tang, present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to pay the Plaintiff the sum of $3,000.00 no later then Aug. 6, 2007, and Plaintiff will provide Defendant with a confirmation letter of full payment, and to dismissed the action when payment is made.
If Defendant failed, Plaintiff shall have a Judgment entered in full amount of $3,735.88
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Matter is placed under CRC 3.1385, Dismissal Calendar on Sept. 18, 2007 at 10 A.M. in Dept. 218.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Set For Trial On Jul-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
